name: Mocha Chocolate Chip Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
To make the chocolate chips: Separate into two separate containers.
1. In a large bowl, combine Graham Cracker Cereals and 1 cup of the chocolate chips with melted butter. Mix well. Press firmly into the bottom and sides (up to 2 1/2 inches) of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a small saucepan, combine milk and instant coffee. Sprinkle gelatin over the mixture. Set aside for 1 minute.
3. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until gelatin and coffee are dissolved.
4. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until creamy. Add sweetened condensed milk and the gelatin mixture. Fold in whipped cream and the remaining chocolate chips.
5. Pour into the prepared pan. Chill for about 2 hours or until firm.
6. Run a knife around the edge of the cake to loosen it from the pan. Remove the rim.
